ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary: Vanilla Social Interactions Expanded
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Let the social stories from Vanilla Social Interactions Expanded make it into the diary.
Venting, teaching, insults, best-friend milestones, birthdays, funerals, and extra social moods each get a fitting place instead of falling into a generic conversation bucket.
Requires Pawn Diary. Safe to leave installed; it stays idle until VSIE is active.
